data.title: Aegis Brands reports Q2 results: system sales down 4.2% to $35.2M, net income up 8.3% to $1.1M, 2 new stores opened.
data.description: Aegis Brands Inc. reported their financial results for the second quarter ending June 29th, 2025. System sales decreased by 4.2% to $35.2 million, with same store sales also down by 7.5%. Adjusted EBITDA for the quarter remained consistent at $1.6 million, while net income increased by 8.3% to $1.1 million. Year-to-date, system sales decreased by 4.7% to $65.3 million, with adjusted EBITDA consistent with the prior year at $2.7 million, and net income improving by 93.9% to $1.2 million. St. Louis Bar & Grill contributed $2.6 million in EBITDA in the second quarter. The company opened two new locations during the quarter, bringing the total new store count to three for the year. St. Louis continues to diversify revenue through retail channels, launching frozen wing products in Longo's, Foodland, and Sobeys stores. The new locations are outperforming the network average by about 16%, driven by updated store design, menu, and training. Management is focusing on key initiatives to drive growth, including enhanced training, new menu items, and targeted marketing. The CEO expressed optimism for the future, emphasizing new store success and retail expansions to increase brand visibility and engage customers.

data.title: Moderna stock falls after lowering sales guidance despite better Q2 results and job cuts.
data.description: Shares of Moderna experienced a decline following the release of its second quarter financial results, which showed a loss that was less than anticipated and exceeded revenue expectations. However, the biotech company also reduced its projected sales for the entire year. As a result, Moderna's stock fell once again, marking a continuation of its recent downward trend. Additionally, the company announced plans for job cuts. The details were shared in an article on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Prepare for conflict resolution to handle stress at work, avoid escalation. Important for maintaining peaceful workplace.
data.description: Prepare for managing on-the-job stress and resolving conflicts with coworkers to prevent escalation. Effective conflict resolution is key to maintaining a harmonious work environment.

data.title: Chevron and Exxon report earnings, now allies collaborating on projects. Major cooperation ahead for the two companies.
data.description: Two major oil companies, Chevron and Exxon, have reported their earnings recently and are now set to collaborate on various projects. This surprising turn of events has brought the rival supermajors together as allies in the industry. The joint efforts between the two companies have significant implications for the future of their operations and the energy sector as a whole. Investors and analysts are closely watching this development as it could lead to strategic benefits and increased efficiency in their projects.

data.title: Curtiss-Wright partners with Rolls-Royce SMR for safety systems in SMR fleet. Significant impact on global nuclear tech.
data.description: In Davidson, North Carolina, Curtiss-Wright has announced a significant partnership with Rolls-Royce SMR to provide essential safety systems for its worldwide Small Modular Reactor (SMR) network. This collaboration underscores Curtiss-Wright's commitment to the CWPoweredfromWithin initiative and strengthens its position in the nuclear energy sector. The partnership aims to enhance the safety of the SMR fleet and promote sustainable energy solutions.

data.title: Dominion Energy reports Q2 2025 net income of $760M ($0.88 per share), up from $563M ($0.64 per share) in Q2 2024.
data.description: In Richmond, Virginia, Dominion Energy, Inc. revealed its unaudited GAAP net income for the quarter ending on June 30, 2025, standing at $760 million ($0.88 per share). This marks a significant increase from the $563 million ($0.64 per share) recorded during the same period in 2024. The company also reported non-GAAP operating earnings of $649 million ($0.75 per share) for the three months ending on June 30, 2025. This data signifies a noteworthy financial performance for Dominion Energy.

data.title: Realbotix to release Q3-2025 financial results on Aug 14, 2025. Investor webinar with CEO Andrew Kiguel at 1:00 pm ET.
data.description: Realbotix Corp., a prominent humanoid robot and AI companion creator, will be announcing its financial results for the three and nine months ended June 30, 2025, on August 14, 2025. The company, listed on TSX-V as XBOT, Frankfurt Stock Exchange as 76M0.F, and OTC as XBOTF, will hold an investor webinar led by CEO Andrew Kiguel on Zoom at 1:00 pm ET to discuss the Q3-2025 financial outcomes.

data.title: Berkshire Hills Bancorp, Inc. declares $0.18 quarterly dividend per share, payable on Aug 21 to shareholders on record by Aug 14.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, Berkshire Hills Bancorp, Inc. (NYSE: BHLB) revealed that its Board of Directors has given the green light for a quarterly cash dividend of $0.18 per common share. This dividend will be paid to shareholders recorded on August 14, 2025, with the payment scheduled for August 21, 2025.

data.title: Aptose appoints Ernst & Young as independent auditor, calls new shareholders meeting.
data.description: Aptose has appointed Ernst & Young Global Limited as its new independent auditor. The decision was made in preparation for the upcoming reconvened meeting of its shareholders. This marks a significant change for the company and highlights their commitment to transparency and accountability. Shareholders should take note of this development as it reflects Aptose's dedication to upholding stringent auditing standards in their financial reporting. The new auditor is expected to bring fresh insights and expertise to the table, contributing to the company's continued growth and success. This move demonstrates Aptose's proactive approach to governance and sound financial practices. Shareholders play a crucial role in overseeing these processes, and the selection of Ernst & Young Global Limited reaffirms Aptose's commitment to maintaining the trust and confidence of its investors.

data.title: Abeona Therapeutics grants equity awards to new employees under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
data.description: On August 1, 2025, a company based in Cleveland, Abeona Therapeutics Inc. (Nasdaq: ABEO), revealed its decision to provide equity awards to fresh non-executive staff members that recently became part of the organization. The approval for these equity awards was done in accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Cboe Global Markets Q2 2025 highlights: Diluted EPS $2.23 (up 68%), Adjusted Diluted EPS $2.46 (up 14%), Record Net Revenue.
data.description: In the second quarter, there were notable achievements as Diluted EPS reached $2.23, showing a 68% increase primarily attributed to the one-time recognition of intangible asset impairment in the Digital reporting unit for 2024. Adjusted Diluted EPS¹ rose by 14% to $2.46 during the same period. The quarter also marked a record high in Net Revenue.
